control_name: Review of SAP configured discounts and rebates control
control_desc:
WHAT & WHY: Gross to net sales calculation. Price conditions in SAP representing selling price or deductions are reviewed to ensure that the gross sales, discounts and net sales reported are accurate; and discounts applied are valid and approved.

HOW: a full review of all SAP price conditions related to sales is performed once a year. During the months when the full review is not performed, the changes on those sales related price conditions are reviewed by the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates.

Full review: a report (Z1, UKMC only: Z5 & 30) is extracted from SAP (transaction V/LD) with all the price conditions related to sales/customers. Accuracy and completeness of the report in SAP is proved by taking screenshots of the parameters to ensure that all the conditions are included. Comments on validity of the price conditions are added by the Supply Chain team or delegates, and the report in excel with the comments is sent to the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates for review and sign-off.

Changes during the month: a report with all the changes during the month is extracted from SAP (transaction  ZV231213). Accuracy and completeness of the report in SAP is proved by taking screenshots of the parameters to ensure that all the conditions are included. Comments on validity of the change are added by the Supply Chain team or delegates, and the report in excel with the comments is sent to the Supply Chain Manager, CFO or delegates for review and sign-off
 
If errors are detected during the review, clear action plan or evidence of the correction is added.

WHEN: Monthly before wd15 (December by wd8

Test Script Path:
General >> 2. As Is Overview >> Use Case 1- IPE >> Data >> Germany MC - FY24 >> FSC008-002 - Germany >> File "Germany MC_FSC008-02_P1 Test Sheet"

validations.validation_desc:
In screenshot2.jpg, check if the fields in the screenshot are filled correctly. The values in these fields should be as follows:
1. Sales Organization: DE10
2: Multiple Selection for Condition Type : ZNAT, ZD39, ZPR0, ZR4W, ZNAG
3. Validity Range : 01.01.2023 to 31.12.2023

%
Validate the input parameters for pricing report generation. 
%

Match the records found in screenshot1.xlsx with the records in screenshot1.jpg.
 
Step1: retrieve the number of rows in screenshot1.xlsx
Step 2: retrieve the row count in screenshot1.jpg. Check if the row count is same for both.



                                                 % Validate the completeness and accuracy of the pricing report. %
In cpt_1.xlsx, verify that comments on validity of the price conditions are added by the Supply Chain team or delegates for all found items.
In cpt_2.jpg, verify that this email exchange talks about the price changes being ready for April 2024. Moreover, also confirm if the price changes have been approved.
